title: Steam Pipe
description: Sit back, relax, and enjoy a magical Steam Pipe crafted from a brewing stand and bamboo hose. Bring chill vibes to your Minecraft world.
body:
**Steam Pipe Plugin**

**A lightweight and immersive plugin that adds a fully functional steam pipe system to your Minecraft server — perfect for roleplay hubs, RPG environments, or cozy social builds!**

**❓ How it works:**
- Place a special brewing stand as the steam pipe base.
- Right-click it while holding bamboo to connect a mouthpiece (up to 4 players at once).
- Hold the bamboo to activate visual steam effects and temporary status effects (like nausea).
- Drop the item to disconnect.
- Automatic disconnection happens if players walk away or log out.

**💡 Features:**
- Fully configurable names and messages via `config.yml`.
- Custom crafting recipe for the pipe stand.
- Beautiful particles and configurable potion effects.
- Smart logic: connection limits, cooldowns, and cleanup.

**📦 Perfect for:**
- Roleplay servers
- Lounges, taverns, cozy indoor spaces
- Any server looking to add atmospheric, social elements!
